question.question_text: What will the NZD/USD exchange rate be on 2026-03-26 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast of a major currency pair, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption). NZD/USD has typical daily volatility of around 0.4-0.6%. Using an annualized volatility of ~8% for NZD/USD, the daily sigma is approximately 8%/sqrt(252) ≈ 0.50%, which on a rate of 0.5809 is about 0.0029. The confidence intervals are constructed symmetrically around the point estimate using multiples of this daily standard deviation: 50% CI uses ~0.67 sigma, 80% CI uses ~1.28 sigma, and 90% CI uses ~1.645 sigma.
